title: Hardcore Revival Co-Op
description: Adds a revival system for Hardcore mode. When players die, they leave behind a gravestone that teammates can use to bring the player back with a Amulet of Resurrection.
body:
# Hardcore Revival Co-Op

A mod for those who don’t want to say goodbye to friends in hardcore.

## What This Mod Does

When players die, instead of losing their world, they become spectators and leave behind a gravestone. Other players can interact with this gravestone to revive them, bringing them back to life with partial health and hunger.

## Features

**Revival System**

*   Dead players enter spectator mode instead of game over
*   Gravestone spawn at death locations
*   Other players can revive the dead by interacting with gravestone
*   Revived players return with 25% health and hunger

**Two Revival Methods**

*   Amulet of Resurrection: Craft and use a special item to revive players
*   Right-click revival: Simply right-click the gravestone (configurable)

**Configuration Options**

*   Choose between amulet-required or free revival
*   Toggle death coordinate broadcasting
*   Enable for hardcore mode only or all game modes
*   Adjust settings with in-game commands

**Advancements**

*   Craft your first amulet
*   Get revived from death
*   Revive another player

## Crafting the Amulet

To craft the **Amulet of Resurrection**, combine the following items in a crafting table:

*   1 Totem of Undying
*   1 Nether Star
*   2 Ender Pearls
*   2 Ghast Tears
*   3 Diamonds

![Amulet of Resurrection Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08c53ebada61060a40b9ccb8929caac49fa8d470.png)

 

## How It Works

1.  Player dies from any cause
2.  They become a spectator instead of losing the game
3.  A gravestone appears at their death location
4.  Other players can revive them using the configured method
5.  Revived player returns to survival mode with reduced stats

 

## Commands

Requires operator permissions:

*   `/hardcorerevival config useitem [true/false] - Toggle amulet requirement`
*   `/hardcorerevival config broadcast [true/false] - Toggle coordinate broadcasting`

## Installation

1.  Install Minecraft Forge 47.4.0+
2.  Put the mod file in your mods folder
3.  Start the game
4.  Configure settings via commands or config files /config/hardcorerevivalcoop-common.toml

undefined

## Best For

*   Multiplayer hardcore servers
*   Cooperative hardcore gameplay
*   Groups who want death to encourage teamwork rather than end the game

This mod gives players extra chances instead of permanent death.
